mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020304-01#Sql001 */ NAME FROM M_CODE WHERE START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CODE_TYPE = '99' AND CODE_1 = '01' AND CODE_2 = '30'
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020304-01#Sql002 */ TOIAWASE_CD ,TOIAWASE_MEI FROM CORDYS.TB_QUESTION_MASTER_IFA WHERE TOIAWASE_KBN = '1' AND SAKUJO_FLG = 0 ORDER BY SORT_NO
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020304-01#Sql003 */ TOIAWASE_CD ,TOIAWASE_MEI FROM CORDYS.TB_QUESTION_MASTER_IFA WHERE TOIAWASE_KBN = '2' AND TOIAWASE_D = #{req.toiawaseDCd} AND SAKUJO_FLG = 0 ORDER BY SORT_NO

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020304-01#SQL004 */ TOIAWASE_CD ,TOIAWASE_MEI FROM CORDYS.TB_QUESTION_MASTER_IFA WHERE TOIAWASE_KBN = '3' AND TOIAWASE_D = #{req.toiawaseDCd} AND TOIAWASE_T = #{req.toiawaseCd} AND SAKUJO_FLG = 0
ORDER BY SORT_NO
